title: Model Name
text: Model Name Suffix of the entity name, which represents a namespace. The model name can be used to group entities and DTDs that are logically related in some way. Expected Value: String of up to 32 characters. Supports Unicode. Default Value: Value of the property in the template used to create the new object. By default, this is .u . Applies To Entity DTD Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
